welcome_text: YO! Welcome to my corner of cyberspace !! If you found this page then you are one of the 1337 few who know where to look. This is my personal portfolio & digital log documenting my journey into the world of cyber security. I'm a computer science & security student currently cracking CTF challenges, studying for certs, and trying not to fall asleep in my network architecture class. By day I learn. By night I solve challenges on picoCTF. ☞ This site works best with JavaScript enabled and a 56k modem. Dial-up welcome.
quote_text:
"Hacking is not a crime. It's a
state of mind."
